query: UPDATE termination_notices SET dataInicio = DATE_ADD(dataInicio, INTERVAL 1 DAY), dataFim = DATE_ADD(dataFim, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute UPDATE termination_notices SET dataInicio = DATE_ADD(dataInicio, INTERVAL 1 DAY), dataFim = DATE_ADD(dataFim, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
